gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and updates.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot and Polly the bee working together to update a giant pixelated book or notice board, representing the automated README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and a tiny bee mascot updating a giant pixelated notice board in a digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute robot with a CRT monitor head and a tiny bee mascot updating a giant pixelated notice board in a digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
